Content type
application/json
{
  • "account_requests_enabled": true,
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "request_ip_address": "string",
  • "system_name": "string",
  • "vms_view": true
}

Excel Exports

Get camera and stream configuration export in Excel format

Gets the list of camera and stream configurations and exports them in an Excel file.

Authorizations:
OAuth2Password

Responses

/api/export/config

AccountRequest

Submit account request

Submits a new-account request for admin review. Available only when the deployment enables the feature.

Responses

/api/account-request

Response samples

  • 202
Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": "string",
  • "property2": "string"
}

List account requests

Lists account requests, optionally filtered by status (pending|approved|rejected).

Authorizations:
OAuth2Password

Responses

/api/account-requests

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "account_request_count": 0,
  • "account_requests": [
    • {
      • "created_at": "string",
      • "desired_role": "admin",
      • "desired_username": "string",
      • "email": "string",
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "justification": "string",
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "organization": "string",
      • "phone": "string",
      • "reason": "string",
      • "reviewed_at": "string",
      • "reviewed_by": "string",
      • "source_ip": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "title": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string"
}

Approve account request

Approves a pending request, creating a user with the admin-assigned role and initial password, and emails the requester.

Authorizations:
OAuth2Password

Responses

/api/account-requests/approve

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "account_request": {
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "desired_role": "admin",
    • "desired_username": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "first_name": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "justification": "string",
    • "last_name": "string",
    • "organization": "string",
    • "phone": "string",
    • "reason": "string",
    • "reviewed_at": "string",
    • "reviewed_by": "string",
    • "source_ip": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "title": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string"
}

Delete account request

Deletes a reviewed (approved/rejected) account request record. Pending requests cannot be deleted â€” they must be approved or rejected first. Deleting an approved request does not affect the already-created user.

Authorizations:
OAuth2Password
path Parameters
id
required
string

Account request ID

Responses

/api/account-requests/delete/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": "string",
  • "property2": "string"
}

Reject account request

Rejects a pending request (with optional reason) and emails the requester.

Authorizations:
OAuth2Password

Responses

/api/account-requests/reject

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "account_request": {
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "desired_role": "admin",
    • "desired_username": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "first_name": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "justification": "string",
    • "last_name": "string",
    • "organization": "string",
    • "phone": "string",
    • "reason": "string",
    • "reviewed_at": "string",
    • "reviewed_by": "string",
    • "source_ip": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "title": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string"
}

PasswordReset

Confirm a password reset

Validates a reset token and sets a new password. Token is single-use and short-lived.

Responses

/api/password-reset/confirm

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": "string",
  • "property2": "string"
}

Request a password reset

Sends a password-reset link to the account's email. Always returns a generic success (no account enumeration). Available only when the deployment enables the feature.

Responses

/api/password-reset/request

Response samples

  • 202
Content type
application/json
{
  • "property1": "string",
  • "property2": "string"
}
